Ok, we also need to create the workflow for starting a cut job. 

It looks like it is initiated like this:
Send to cutter that we want to prepare for loading a cutting mat:
1b00109034f60991ffff00000000090000030018000203150000007365746d61743a303b4a53363131372c313534383b

cutter replies:
1b00109034f60991ffff0000000009000103001800020300000000

ask for status (i think):
1b00109034f60991ffff0000000009000003001800020305000000544234323b

Cutter replies:
1b00109034f60991ffff0000000009000103001800020300000000
1b0010d01df80991ffff000000000900010300180081030d000000544234323a4c4f4144494e473b

We continue polling until cutter reports back that load media is pressed:
1b00b0e20df30991ffff0000000009000103001800810311000000544234323a4c4f4144505245535345443b

and if loading is successfull cutter reports:
1b00b0e20df30991ffff0000000009000103001800810311000000544234323a4c4f4144535543434553533b

Cutter asks for data:
1b00a04225fe0991ffff000000000900010300180081030b000000544234323a53544152543b

We reply:
1b00e044affe0991ffff0000000009000003001800810300000000
1b00b04439ee0991ffff000000000900000300180002033c000000494e3b0d0a5350313b465331303b56533235303b505534302c34303b504434302c36303b5055353837352c313236353b5044363131372c313236353b

Cutter replies:
1b00b04439ee0991ffff0000000009000103001800020300000000

We reply:
1b00b004ebe80991ffff00000000090000030018000203370000005044363131372c313534383b5044353837352c313534383b5044353837352c313236353b5055302c303b5350323b5055302c303b50473b

Cutter replies (we have pressed start on cutter):
1b00b004ebe80991ffff0000000009000103001800020300000000

cutter reports busy:
1b00e044affe0991ffff000000000900010300180081030a000000544234323a425553593b

We poll for status:
1b00e0848df00991ffff0000000009000003001800020305000000544234323b

Until cutter reports:
1b00e0848df00991ffff0000000009000103001800020300000000
1b00e034fb010a91ffff0000000009000103001800810310000000544234323a435554535543434553533b

Cutter reports (probably after we press eject media on cutter): 
1b00b0e20df30991ffff000000000900010300180081030d000000544234323a4355544f5645523b

We reply with resetting the stream:
1b0060c9fc010a91ffff000000001e00000300180081fe00000000

Cutter responds:
1b0060c9fc010a91ffff000000001e00010300180081fe00000000
